calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-16-2025 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-02-2024 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Feb-13-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Gina Lera, Esq., for and with Ona Belmont, Petitioner.

The court at the outset confirms that Ms. Ona Belmont was formally known as Ona Marie Williamson. The court determines that it is not concerned with the notice issue to the adopted child. The court confirms that there are no appearances to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration With Will Annexed. The will dated Aug-30-1983 is admitted to probate. Ona Belmont is appointed as Administrator with Will Annexed, with full authority. Bond is not required. Amy Harrington is appointed probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Apr-16-2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Prado. Not Reported.
